steps.title: Test the choices in each equation
steps.content: Substitute each candidate into $y=5(x-3)$ and $y=(x-3)^2$. For $(8,25)$: $5(8-3)=25$ and $(8-3)^2=25$, so both equations hold.

steps.title: Identify the matching pair
steps.content:
Only $(8,25)$ satisfies both equations simultaneously. That matches choice B — B is correct.

A solution to a system must satisfy both equations at the same time, so one successful ordered pair is enough once the other choices fail one of the equations.
